Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All hematological parameters are within or close to normal limits, except for a mildly elevated hematocrit and markedly increased platelet distribution width. These findings may indicate mild hemoconcentration and increased platelet size variability, which can be seen in reactive states or early myeloproliferative processes. Clinical correlation is recommended.
Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
